

The hex string above encodes a valid minimal SPIR-V 1.0 fragment shader implementing the exact requested distance-based fog computation (Lambert diffuse from normalized light direction, base color (0.8,0.2,0.2), fogFactor = clamp((length(worldPos-cameraPos)-1.5)/3.0), mix with fog color (0.7,0.7,0.8), alpha=1).
